basic_details.job_title: PRL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Trainee Scientific Assistant and Trainee Technical Assistant Posts
basic_details.post_name: Trainee Scientific Assistant / Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics)
basic_details.short_information: Physical Research Laboratory (PRL) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the PRL Recruitment 2026 for Trainee Scientific Assistant and Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics) posts.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Physics/Chemistry/Geophysics/Geology/Optics/ or Equivalent Engineering Degree (60% or equivalent marks), Diploma in Electronics Engineering (60% or equivalent marks) with one year post qualification experience
qualification.details: Trainee Scientific Assistant: M.Sc in Physics/Chemistry/Geophysics/Geology/Optics/ or Equivalent Engineering Degree (60% or equivalent marks). Desirable: one year of working experience in a laboratory or industry. Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics): Diploma in Electronics Engineering (60% or equivalent marks). Experience: One year of post qualification experience in laboratory or industry.

salary_details.details: Trainee Scientific Assistant: ₹35,000/- per month (Consolidated) Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics): ₹23,500/- per month (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for PRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the PRL Recruitment 2026 is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in PRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Trainee Scientific Assistant and Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics) in the Physical Research Laboratory Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for PRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application for PRL Recruitment 2026 must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Trainee Scientific Assistant?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Trainee Scientific Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of ₹35,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics)?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics) post will receive a consolidated salary of ₹23,500/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for Trainee Scientific Assistant?
faq.answer: For the Trainee Scientific Assistant position, candidates need an M.Sc degree in Physics, Chemistry, Geophysics, Geology, Optics, or an equivalent Engineering Degree with at least 60% marks.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics)?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Trainee Technical Assistant (Electronics) post must hold a Diploma in Electronics Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks and one year of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for PRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the PRL Recruitment 2026. Applications are free of cost.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for PRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for PRL Recruitment 2026 involves shortlisting of applications followed by an online interview or interaction with the selection committee.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for PRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for PRL Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
